title: `use of undeclared identifier` error on OSX Sierra
body:
When I try running `make` I get a `use of undeclared identifier` error copied below. I've tried running make with both clang and gcc enabled in the makefile. My machine:
* OSX Sierra 10.12.2
* clang -v Apple LLVM version 8.0.0 (clang-800.0.42.1)

Any suggestions?

```
jberi-macbookpro:yosys 🤖  $ make
Configured with: --prefix=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/usr --with-gxx-include-dir=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX10.12.sdk/usr/include/c++/4.2.1
[  0%] Building kernel/version_e54c355b.cc
[  0%] Building kernel/version_e54c355b.o
[  1%] Building kernel/driver.o
kernel/driver.cc:510:4: error: use of undeclared identifier 'append_history'
                        append_history(where_history() - history_offset, history_f...
                        ^
kernel/driver.cc:516:27: error: use of undeclared identifier 'history_list'
        HIST_ENTRY **hist_list = history_list();
                                 ^
2 errors generated.
make: *** [kernel/driver.o] Error 1
```
code_blocks:
jberi-macbookpro:yosys 🤖  $ make
Configured with: --prefix=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/usr --with-gxx-include-dir=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX10.12.sdk/usr/include/c++/4.2.1
[  0%] Building kernel/version_e54c355b.cc
[  0%] Building kernel/version_e54c355b.o
[  1%] Building kernel/driver.o
kernel/driver.cc:510:4: error: use of undeclared identifier 'append_history'
                        append_history(where_history() - history_offset, history_f...
                        ^
kernel/driver.cc:516:27: error: use of undeclared identifier 'history_list'
        HIST_ENTRY **hist_list = history_list();
                                 ^
2 errors generated.
make: *** [kernel/driver.o] Error 1
